faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Franklin Square homes typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all common Long Island spider species, using targeted treatments that address the specific behaviors of each type.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide spider control service in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Franklin Square residents in most cases. Our local technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess the situation and begin treatment, ensuring rapid relief from spider problems.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 spider control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive spider control package includes a thorough inspection, interior and exterior treatment, web removal, entry point sealing, and preventative measures. The final price depends on your property size, infestation severity, and whether ongoing maintenance is needed. We provide free estimates for all Franklin Square properties.

faqs.question: Are your spider control treatments safe for families and pets in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and can recommend pet-friendly treatment options. Most families can return to treated areas within 2-4 hours of application.
